All rates fully inclusive · instant confirmation · no booking fees

3 suites available · 14–17 Aug 2026 · 3 nights · 2 guests

River Suite

Sleeps 2Plunge poolRiver deck

Glass-walled and cantilevered over the dry riverbed, where elephants pass below at first light.

Treehouse Suite

Sleeps 2Star bedMost private

Lifted into the jackalberry canopy, with a sliding roof above the bed for sleeping under the Milky Way.

No suites free for those dates

The reserve books up fast in peak season. Try a different window, or tell us your dates and we'll let you know the moment a suite opens.
